svg.title: double cup v2 -- parallax 3d
svg.desc: Maqueta v2: mismo material y misma mascara que v1; talla nueva. Tres copias del bloque (sustrato/vidrio/liquido) giran con perspectiva a amplitudes distintas (4/7/9 grados) = parallax; sombra eliptica en contrafase con la levitacion; barrido especular en mix-blend-mode screen; canvas propio.

tspan.tspan: # flujo - operational agent workspace `flujo` is a local-first workspace for requests, jobs, briefs,
design operations, RD/suplementos work, Studio/eventos work, web hub, and agent-delivered patches.
This repository is optimized for agent continuity. The goal is operational clarity: read the handoff
, make a minimal complete change, verify, and deliver through `_airdrop/` if there is no push access
. ## Mandatory agent entry Read in this order: 1. AGENTS.md 2
task If there is a conflict, this
order wins: 1. Direct user instruction 2. AGENTS.m
ME.md ## Environment Primary user environment: Windo
facing Python command: py Do not
tell the user to run python Keep context/LAST_HANDOF
ets, or sensitive real data Remote
y -m flujo app py -m flujo app --de
rop/` if there is no push
e is a conflict, this ord
: py Do not tell the user
er.html Build: cd web npm run typ
access must deliver a ZIP contai
sts/ -q py -m flujo verify Web cha
test_cache rm -rf _logs git status --short Do not commit or include in airdrops: __pycache__/ .pytes
t_cache/ node_modules/ dist/ build/ _airdrop/ _airdrop_backups/ _logs/ *.zip *.db credentials heavy
real assets ## Repository map src/flujo/ core Python package and CLI web/ React/Vite local web hub c
